changes.comment: Add optional streaming APIs to `ICloudBuildCacheProvider` and `FileSystemBuildCacheProvider`, allowing cache plugins to stream entries to and from the cloud cache without buffering entire contents in memory. Implement streaming in `@rushstack/rush-http-build-cache-plugin`, `@rushstack/rush-amazon-s3-build-cache-plugin`, and `@rushstack/rush-azure-storage-build-cache-plugin`.
